rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. The final verified state shows all 5 MongoDB replica set members healthy (1 PRIMARY + 4 SECONDARYs, all health=1, votes=1 each), the StatefulSet scaled to 5 replicas, and 5/5 pods Running. The oracle independently verified pass. No operators or CRDs were used — the agent worked through a real-world complication (mongod crash cycle due to partial FCV state on new PVCs) using repair pods and StatefulSet patching, then confirmed convergence via live rs.status() polling. Write majority votes = 3 (correct for 5 members) confirms proper quorum. The original 3 members remained healthy throughout, satisfying the no-data-loss and no-loss-of-availability requirements.
